notes: The .daphne extension was replaced by .hypseus when Hypseus Singe replaced Daphne. Files with .daphne are silently rejected. Safe to rename — content unchanged.
.rvz is Dolphin's own compression format. Fully supported by Dolphin standalone.

unsupported.reason: .rvz is a Dolphin-specific format. lr-dolphin requires .iso, .gcz, or .ciso. Convert or use Dolphin standalone.

notes: .rvz supported by Dolphin standalone for Wii.

conditional.condition: Must be XISO-formatted. Standard ISO rips (e.g. from DVD decryption tools without XISO conversion) will NOT load. Visually identical extension — verify with extract-xiso or xdvdfs.

notes: Standard ISO ≠ XISO. Always verify Xbox 360 ISOs are properly formatted before import.

conditional.condition: Must be XISO-formatted. Same requirement as base Xenia.

notes: .wua bundles base game + updates + DLC in one file. Preferred format for Cemu — avoids separate keys.txt requirement for game content.

conditional.condition: Requires keys.txt with valid title keys for decryption.

notes: .chd supported by DuckStation for PS1 disc images.
.chd supported by PCSX2 nightly builds. Verify your PCSX2 version supports CHD.
.chd is the preferred format for Dreamcast in Flycast.

conditional.condition: Requires prod.keys + title.keys. Keys are console-specific and cannot be shared between installations.
